nasb.text: Nevertheless He saved them for the sake of His name, That He might make His power known.

esv.text: Yet he saved them for his name’s sake, that he might make known his mighty power.

cnv.text: 但他因自己的名的緣故拯救他們， 為要彰顯他的大能。

ccb.text: 但祂为了自己的名拯救了他们， 以彰显祂的大能。

csbs.text: 但他为自己名的缘故拯救他们， 为要彰显他的大能。
